title: Weekly Go China Radar
subtitle: Narrative meets risk control.
scope: Issue 003 of the GCA Weekly Go China Radar. This issue records public activity cadence, official market identity, no-artificial-volume boundaries, member utility readiness, and reviewer links. It is not live market data, not financial advice, not a buy or sell recommendation, and not a price forecast.

narrativeThemes.name: Public activity without artificial volume
narrativeThemes.description: Grow the Go China Access story through visible updates, community education, reviewer links, and market-quality disclosures instead of self-trading, fake volume, or price promises.

narrativeThemes.name: Reviewer-ready trust links
narrativeThemes.description: Keep Base Mainnet identity, official GCA/USDT market route, token safety, reserve disclosure, Blockaid follow-up, and external-review status easy to verify from one public path.

narrativeThemes.name: Member utility readiness
narrativeThemes.description: Move the access story toward controlled account UI, read-only wallet checks, 100 utility credits, 30-day GCA Member review, and manual member benefit controls without claiming self-service access is live.

riskNotes: GCA is still early-stage and current liquidity is starter-depth only.
BaseScan token profile review is not complete until BaseScan publishes it.
Owner observed no wallet risk warning visible on 2026-05-14; this is not security-vendor approval or a permanent cross-wallet guarantee.
No third-party audit has been completed.
Public activity must not use artificial volume, self-trading, wash trading, price promises, or paid listing shortcuts.
Credits, member status, and the planned 10,000 GCA member benefit are account-level concepts, not cash, income, reimbursement, or trading permission.

safeClaims: Weekly Go China Radar is the official GCA content format for narrative research and risk education.
Issue 003 focuses on public activity cadence, no-artificial-volume boundaries, and member utility readiness.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: artificial volume, self-trading, wash trading, or misleading market activity
public account UI, 100 credits claiming, or GCA Member activation is live before controlled HTTPS account UI and ledger activation are released
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it

trustSignals: BaseScan source and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete.
GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
Owner observed no wallet risk warning visible on 2026-05-14; this is not security-vendor approval or a permanent cross-wallet guarantee.
The official public market route remains the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
The public site now health-checks buy guide, status, listing kit, whitepaper, security, risk, FAQ, and reviewer pages.
Public trust, token safety, external review, and wallet-warning evidence pages are live.
publicActivityPlan: Publish public activity through weekly updates, education, and verifiable links rather than artificial activity.
Share the verify, trust, markets, and risk pages before sharing any swap link.
Use Telegram and X posts to explain the Go China Access thesis, not price targets or volume claims.
Invite holders to use the member pre-registration and read-only balance preview as preparation only.
Publish future liquidity or listing changes with exact public links and transaction references.
